regulations.GDPR Article 4: Consent must be a freely given, specific, unambiguous indication... pre-ticked boxes are invalid.
regulations.GDPR Article 5: Principles relating to processing of personal data: purpose limitation, data minimization.
regulations.GDPR Article 6: Processing is only lawful if the data subject has given explicit consent. Opt-out is invalid.
regulations.GDPR Article 7: Conditions for consent, including the right to withdraw consent.
regulations.GDPR Article 8: Conditions applicable to child's consent in relation to information society services.
regulations.GDPR Article 9: Processing of special categories of personal data (including biometrics and inferred sensitive data) is prohibited without explicit consent or strict exemptions.
regulations.GDPR Article 12: Transparent information, communication and modalities for the exercise of the rights of the data subject. Must be free of charge and without undue burden (no dark patterns).
regulations.GDPR Article 13: Information provided where data are collected. Must include controller identity, recipients of data, and retention.
regulations.GDPR Article 16: Right to rectification of inaccurate personal data.
regulations.GDPR Article 17: Right to erasure ('right to be forgotten').
regulations.GDPR Article 20: Right to data portability. Data subject shall have the right to receive personal data.
regulations.GDPR Article 22: Right not to be subject to a decision based solely on automated processing, including profiling.
regulations.GDPR Article 27: Representatives of controllers or processors not established in the Union.
regulations.GDPR Article 28: Processor obligations and guarantees regarding sub-processors.
regulations.GDPR Article 32: Security of processing. Data should be encrypted.
regulations.GDPR Article 33: Notification of a personal data breach to the supervisory authority within 72 hours.
regulations.GDPR Article 37: Designation of the data protection officer processing on a large scale.
regulations.GDPR Article 88: Processing in the context of employment requires specific rules to safeguard human dignity, legitimate interests and fundamental rights.
regulations.CCPA 1798.120: Right to direct a business not to sell personal information. 'Sale' includes sharing for value. Applies strict rules for minors.
regulations.CCPA 1798.125: A business shall not discriminate against a consumer for exercising privacy rights. Financial incentives require explicit notice.
regulations.CCPA 1798.130: Businesses must allow requests from authorized agents on behalf of the consumer, provide access beyond 12 months, and not place undue burden on deletion requests.
regulations.CPRA: Consumers have the right to opt-out of the sharing of personal information for cross-context behavioral advertising.

neutral_boilerplate: Information Security: We employ industry-standard encryption to protect your data.
Updates: This policy may be updated periodically. We will notify you of any material changes.
Cookies: We use cookies to ensure the basic functionality of our website.
Business Transfers: In the event of a merger or acquisition, user data may be transferred.
Third-Party Links: Our platform contains links to external websites not governed by this policy.
Accessibility: We are committed to making our privacy policy accessible to all users.
Data Hosting: Our primary servers are located in secure facilities.
Policy Scope: This privacy notice applies to all services operated by our company.
Changes to Terms: Continued use of the service signifies acceptance of minor policy tweaks.
